![re2re3gc](https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/re2re3gc/main2.jpg)

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$  Added an option to skip doors animation

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$  Added an option to unthrottle emulator during door skip (speeds up loading)

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$  Added an option to enable [Logitech G LIGHTSYNC RGB Lighting](https://www.logitechg.com/innovation/lightsync-rgb.html)

Plugin should be compatible with any recent version of the emulator, but if not, open an issue.

    Installation:
        Download and extract the archive to the directory, where Dolphin x64 executable is located.
        Check the ini file for available features.
        Launch the game.

[Website](https://thirteenag.github.io/wfp#re2re3gc) | [Source](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/source/ResidentEvil2.RE3.Dolphin.FusionFix/dllmain.cpp) | [Default INI File](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/data/ResidentEvil2.RE3.Dolphin.FusionFix/scripts/ResidentEvil2.RE3.Dolphin.FusionFix.ini)
